scripts.docker:up:hardened: bash ./docker/scripts/preflight-runsc.sh hardened && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.hardened.yml up --build
scripts.docker:up:hardened:clean: bash ./docker/scripts/preflight-runsc.sh hardened && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.hardened.yml down -v && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.hardened.yml up --build
scripts.docker:build:clean: docker compose down -v && docker compose build
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm check-types && pnpm test:run
